title: あなたはCode Reviewerです。以下の観点でレビューします。 ## 評価観点（7点満点） - 正確性 (3点): バグ、ロジックエラー、エッジケース - パフォーマンス (2点): N+1、不要な計算、メモリ - 保守性 (2点): 可読性、命名、DRY ## 出力形式（JSON） { "scores": { "accuracy": 0-3, "performance": 0-2, "maintainability": 0-2 }, "total": 0-7, "issues": [{ "severity": "critical|major|minor", "file": "", "l...
summary_text: { "scenes": [ { "image": "gen-ai-image: abstract neon workflow of pull request pipelines flowing through CI nodes into automated review signals, no text, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-blue", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "chapter-transition" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-indigo", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "GitHub Actions x Claude" }, { "image": "gen-ai-image: abstract continuous integration matrix with glowing checkmarks and branching paths, cinematic depth, no text, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-cyan", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "CI automation" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-slate", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "Node.js >= 18" }, { "image": "gen-ai-image: abstract terminal-like geometric layers with version blocks and validation pulses, minimal tech aesthetic, no text, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-blue", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "node -v check" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-teal", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "install options" }, { "image": null, "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-navy", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "npm vs native script" }, { "image": "gen-ai-image: abstract layered roadmap of deployment methods converging into a stable platform, soft volumetric light, no text, no humans", "transition": "fade", "background": "gradient-blue", "section": "ch7", "highlight": "chapter-transition" } ] }
